info.title: Dermatolog Pro Self-hosted Clinical Workspace Contracts

LesionComparisonDecisionDraft.description: Metadata-only doctor draft for a selected lesion image-pair decision. No patient delivery or protected file fields.

AssetCaptureMetadata.description: Production capture metadata for one clinical asset. No image bytes, storage paths, signed URLs, QR/session/credential material, or patient delivery.

deviceEvidence.description: Batch BK production device-provided capture evidence. Metadata-only: no serials, credentials, network identifiers, image paths, or patient delivery.

productionAssetReadiness.description: Batch BM protected production asset readiness. Metadata-only: exposes only readiness status and reason codes, never bucket, key, path, signed URL, bytes, or patient delivery.

deviceBridgeQuality.description: Batch BL Device Bridge quality gate. Metadata-only: no serials, hostnames, network identifiers, worker payloads, credentials, storage paths, signed URLs, or patient delivery.

captureProtocol.description: Batch BN capture protocol evidence. Metadata-only: no EXIF payloads, GPS, operator names, serials, credentials, storage paths, signed URLs, or patient delivery.

LesionCaptureMetadata.description: Doctor-side production capture metadata ledger for one lesion. Metadata-only and no clinical conclusion.

LesionComparisonViewerQaDraft.description: Metadata-only doctor viewer QA draft for technical markers and calibration limits. Patient delivery and medical measurements are disabled.

reviewerWorkflow.description: Batch BH calibrated reviewer workflow gate. Metadata only; no patient delivery, medical measurement, or clinical conclusion.

measurementPolicy.description: Batch BO measurement policy status. This approves only technical reviewer workflow boundaries; medical measurement remains disabled.

reviewerAssignment.description: Batch BP metadata-only reviewer assignment status. Reviewer identity values are not exposed in API/UI/audit responses.

secondReview.description: Batch BP metadata-only second-review status. Reviewer identities and patient delivery remain disabled.

productionAnalysisPolicy.description: Batch BQ production analysis policy gate. Approves only production-readiness; no dynamic clinical conclusion or patient delivery is generated.

LesionComparisonViewerQaReview.description: Metadata-only doctor technical review over an existing viewer QA draft. Patient delivery, medical measurements and clinical dynamic conclusions are disabled.

LesionComparisonViewerQaReviewerWorkflow.description: Batch BH/BP metadata-only calibrated reviewer workflow over an existing technical-ready viewer QA draft. Backend gates require technical_ready review, ready calibration, ready capture metadata, two technical markers, approved measurement policy, reviewer assignment, and completed/not-required second review.

LesionComparisonMeasurementPolicy.description: Batch BO metadata-only measurement policy gate for clinical-grade reviewer operations. It approves only the technical reviewer workflow boundary and never enables medical measurement, patient delivery, or clinical dynamic conclusions.

LesionComparisonViewerQaReviewQueue.description: Visit-scoped doctor queue for metadata-only viewer QA review decisions. Pair keys, image IDs, protected image fields, patient delivery, medical measurements, and clinical dynamic conclusions are not exposed.

reviewerAssignment.description: Batch BP metadata-only reviewer assignment status. Reviewer identity values are not exposed in API/UI/audit responses.

secondReview.description: Batch BP metadata-only second-review status. Reviewer identities and patient delivery remain disabled.

productionAnalysisPolicy.description: Batch BQ production analysis policy gate. Approves only production-readiness; no dynamic clinical conclusion or patient delivery is generated.

LesionLongitudinalQa.description: Metadata-only longitudinal QA readiness gate for a lesion timeline. It exposes aggregate technical readiness only: no pair keys, image IDs, protected image fields, patient delivery, medical measurements, or clinical dynamic conclusions.

VisitLongitudinalDatasetValidation.description: Batch BJ visit-scoped production dataset validation for lesion timelines. Metadata-only: no pair keys, image IDs, protected image fields, patient delivery, medical measurements, or clinical dynamic conclusions.

LesionLongitudinalHistory.description: Production-safe doctor-side longitudinal lesion ledger assembled from visits and clinical asset metadata. No protected image bytes, storage paths, signed URLs, patient delivery, or clinical conclusion is exposed.

LesionComparisonReviewerAssignment.description: Batch BP write-only reviewer assignment / second-review request. Reviewer UUIDs are accepted only as write-only backend payload and are not exposed in response, UI, or audit metadata.

VisitLongitudinalTimelineRolloutEvidence.description: Batch BT metadata-only monitoring evidence receipt for timeline rollout. No patient delivery, measurements, protected fields, or clinical dynamic conclusions.
Batch BT timeline rollout evidence review payload. Protected fields and clinical claims are rejected by service validation.

VisitLongitudinalTimelineRolloutMonitori.description: Batch BU metadata-only monitoring outcomes and incident evidence for timeline rollout. No patient delivery, measurements, protected fields, raw incident payloads, or clinical dynamic conclusions.
Batch BU timeline rollout monitoring outcomes payload. Protected fields, raw incident payloads, patient rows, and clinical claims are rejected by service validation.

get.summary: Read production capture metadata for one lesion
get.description: Doctor-side metadata ledger for capture source, device, frame, quality, and calibration readiness. No protected image bytes, object bucket/key, signed URLs, storage paths, patient delivery, or clinical conclusions.

get.summary: Stream a protected lesion image through the self-hosted doctor backend proxy
get.description: Doctor-side binary proxy only. The response is image bytes with no JSON body, no signed URL, no storage path, no object bucket/key, no QR/session/credential material, and no patient delivery.

200.description: Protected image bytes streamed by the backend proxy

403.description: The staff user is outside the allowed clinic scope

404.description: Image metadata or binary object was not found

get.summary: Read a doctor-side metadata-only longitudinal ledger for one lesion across visits
Read the metadata-only longitudinal QA readiness gate for one lesion timeline
get.description: Doctor-side technical QA gate only. No pair keys, image IDs, protected image fields, patient delivery, medical measurements, signed URLs, storage paths, QR/session/credential material, or clinical dynamic conclusions.

get.summary: Read the production clinical assessment for a visit

patch.summary: Create or update the production clinical assessment for a visit
Create or update production capture metadata for one visit asset
patch.description: Metadata-only asset capture conditions for doctor-side technical comparison. No image bytes, object bucket/key, signed URL, storage path, QR/session/credential material, or patient delivery.

get.summary: Read the production clinical conclusion for a visit

patch.summary: Create or update the production clinical conclusion for a visit
Persist a metadata-only doctor draft for a selected lesion image-pair comparison decision
Persist metadata-only doctor viewer QA for technical markers and calibration limits
patch.description: Doctor-side metadata only. This never enables patient delivery, medical measurement, signed URLs, storage paths, QR/session/credential material, or clinical dynamic conclusions.

patch.summary: Persist Batch BO measurement policy gate metadata for an existing viewer QA draft
patch.description: Doctor-side technical policy only. Approval allows reviewer workflow gating but never enables medical measurement, patient delivery, signed URLs, storage paths, QR/session/credential material, or clinical dynamic conclusions.

patch.summary: Review lesion comparison production analysis policy gate
patch.description: Batch BQ metadata-only production analysis policy gate. Does not generate clinical dynamic conclusions, patient delivery, measurements, signed URLs, or protected image payloads.

patch.summary: Persist a metadata-only doctor technical review for an existing viewer QA draft
patch.description: Doctor-side technical review only. This never enables patient delivery, medical measurement, signed URLs, storage paths, QR/session/credential material, or clinical dynamic conclusions.

get.summary: Read the visit-scoped metadata-only viewer QA review queue
get.description: Doctor-side operational queue only. This never exposes pair keys, image IDs, patient delivery, medical measurements, signed URLs, storage paths, QR/session/credential material, or clinical dynamic conclusions.

patch.summary: Assign reviewer / second-review gate for viewer QA

200.description: Stage 5H envelope with metadata-only viewer QA draft. Reviewer identity values are not exposed.

patch.summary: Persist Batch BH calibrated reviewer workflow metadata for an existing viewer QA draft
patch.description: Backend gates require technical_ready review, ready calibration, ready capture metadata, two technical markers, and approved measurement policy. This never enables patient delivery, medical measurement, signed URLs, storage paths, QR/session/credential material, or clinical dynamic conclusions.

get.summary: Read visit-scoped metadata-only longitudinal dataset validation
get.description: Batch BJ doctor-side production dataset validation for timeline QA rollout. This never exposes pair keys, image IDs, patient delivery, medical measurements, signed URLs, storage paths, QR/session/credential material, or clinical dynamic conclusions.

patch.summary: Create or update the production visit report
Review production timeline rollout governance for a visit
Review production timeline rollout SOP for a visit
Review timeline rollout monitoring evidence for a visit
Review timeline rollout monitoring outcomes for a visit
